title: tirucalia goetzei
intro: Tirucalia goetzei, also known as the Goetze's tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The medicinal properties of Tirucalia goetzei are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds like limonene and α-pinene, and its extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Tirucalia goetzei include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, fever, and skin infections. Tirucalia goetzei is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments for wound healing and skin care.
